summary: Corrected the Phase 12 human front-stage after manual run 27934320671 succeeded technically but produced low-value email/video presentation: the email now treats the Chinese brief as the reading entry point, keeps Release as backend evidence/download storage, demotes video to an optional file link, and removes backend ROI score from the MP4 transcript.
scope: Release landing-page suppression from email body
Release notes positioning as evidence/download storage
non_scope: no new SMTP send in this code-change commit
no direct GitHub Release upload outside the manual workflow
model_delta: Refines MOD-ADP-034 to adp-manual-delivery-test-v1.3 for human front-stage quality after a real manual test email.
formula_delta: Refreshes FORM-ADP-036 with email-as-reading-entry, Release-as-backend-storage, optional video, and MP4 transcript ROI suppression requirements.
parameter_delta: Updates PARAM-ADP-186 and adds PARAM-ADP-267 for MP4 transcript ROI score suppression after owner controls occupied PARAM-ADP-187 through PARAM-ADP-266.
tests_run: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_frontstage_focus PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_global_scan.py arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_scheduled_execution.py arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_video.py arxiv-daily-push/tests/test_cli.py -q
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_frontstage_all PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest discover -s arxiv-daily-push/tests -q
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_frontstage_root PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests/governance -p 'test_*.py' -q
test_results: semantic extractor: 37 active formulas and 266 active parameters checked with no errors
root governance unit tests: 126 tests OK; missing-base lines are expected negative fixtures with exit code 0
information quality validation: PASS errors 0 warnings 0
changed-only governance sync with semantic checks: errors 0 warnings 0; projects changed arxiv-daily-push only
cache check: no __pycache__ or .pyc files found under arxiv-daily-push or tests/governance

failure_reasons: Release was not a human reading entry point
email foregrounded a short video instead of the Chinese brief
MP4 transcript exposed backend ROI score

email_frontstage_contract.subject_format: YYYYMMDD -- Project Name -- arXiv Group -- Theme
email_frontstage_contract.video_position: optional file link after text evidence

rollback: Revert version 0.13.1 front-stage quality code, tests, phase record, manifest, event, and governance records, then restore version 0.13.0.
risks: The revised front-stage still needs PR CI, merge to main, and a controlled manual workflow_dispatch to prove the next real email renders as intended.
Scheduled production remains disabled until the owner separately approves production variables.
